_meta.note: DIFFICULTY_AUDIT named 15 entries (adhere to, advocate, bridle, consist, dispose, elderly, give rise to, possess, pursue, refrain, relate to, repudiate, associated, attach, avoid) plus 3 more flagged but not printed. A scan of the current vocab.normalized.json shows all 15 named entries already carry clean Hebrew translations (likely fixed in commit 5bbdcd1). However a broader scan for the literal substring '...' inside hebrewTranslation surfaces 5 entries that still use it as a placeholder for the verb's object — same root cause as the audit (raw import strings carried '...' to mark 'something/someone goes here'). These 5 are the actual remaining occurrences. Two other matches (vocab_whereas, amirnet_b4_not_only_but_also) use '...' intentionally inside stock construction patterns (e.g. 'בשעה ש... בעוד...', 'לא רק...אלא גם') and are left as-is.

fixed.before: לחלוק על..., להיות שונה, לא להסכים
fixed.after: להיות שונה, לחלוק על משהו, לא להסכים
להתייחס אל, לטפל ב; תענוג, פינוק

intentionalSkipped.hebrewTranslation: בשעה ש... בעוד... (מראה על ניגוד בין משפטים)
intentionalSkipped.reason: Stock contrast construction; '...' marks 'clause goes here' and is part of the teaching pattern.
Stock paired-construction pattern; '...' marks the elided clause.
